log.before:
# Design Specification for RealEstate Web Application

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                 | HTTP Method | Function Name           | Template Rendered         | Route Parameters         | Context Variables Passed to Template (name : type) | POST Form Data Expected (name : type)                                  |
|----------------------------|-------------|------------------------|---------------------------|--------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | GET         | root_redirect           | -                         | -                        | -                                                   | -                                                                         |
| /dashboard                 | GET         | dashboard              | dashboard.html            | -                        | featured_properties : list(dict), recent_listings : list(dict)          | -                                                                         |
| /search                   | GET         | property_search        | search.html               | -                        | properties : list(dict), locations : list(dict), filter_options : dict   | -                                                                         |
| /search                   | POST        | property_search        | search.html               | -                        | properties : list(dict), locations : list(dict), filter_options : dict   | location_input : str, price_range_min : float, price_range_max : float, property_type_filter : str |
| /property/<int:property_id> | GET         | property_details       | property_details.html     | property_id : int        | property : dict                                                         | -                                                                         |
| /inquiry                  | GET         | property_inquiry       | inquiry.html              | -                        | properties : list(dict)                                                 | -                                                                         |
| /inquiry                  | POST        | submit_inquiry         | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict)                                                  | select_property : int (property_id), inquiry_name : str, inquiry_email : str, inquiry_phone : str, inquiry_message : str |
| /inquiries                | GET         | my_inquiries           | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                           | -                                                                         |
| /inquiries/filter         | POST        | filter_inquiries       | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                           | inquiry_status_filter : str                                               |
| /inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id> | POST | delete_inquiry         | inquiries.html            | inquiry_id : int         | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                           | -                                                                         |
| /favorites                | GET         | my_favorites           | favorites.html            | -                        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id -> dict)     | -                                                                         |
| /favorites/add/<int:property_id> | POST | add_to_favorites        | favorites.html            | property_id : int        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id -> dict)     | -                                                                         |
| /favorites/remove/<int:property_id> | POST | remove_from_favorites    | favorites.html            | property_id : int        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id -> dict)     | -                                                                         |
| /agents                   | GET         | agent_directory        | agents.html               | -                        | agents : list(dict)                                                    | -                                                                         |
| /locations                | GET         | locations_page         | locations.html            | -                        | locations : list(dict), sort_option : str                             | -                                                                         |
| /locations/sort           | POST        | sort_locations         | locations.html            | -                        | locations : list(dict), sort_option : str                             | location_sort : str                                                       |

### Explanation:
- The root route `/` redirects to `/dashboard`.
- For POST routes handling forms, the expected form fields are defined.
- Context variables include lists of dictionaries representing data records.
- The favorites page requires both favorites list and a property lookup dictionary for display.
- Inquiries filtering and deletion are handled via POST requests to appropriate routes.
- The locations page supports sorting via POST route.

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates (Frontend)

### 1. dashboard.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page
  - featured-properties
  - browse-properties-button
  - my-inquiries-button
  - my-favorites-button
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendations. Each dict includes keys: property_id (int), address (str), price (float), image_url (str).
  - recent_listings (list of dict): Recent property listings, same structure as featured_properties.
- Navigation Mappings (Flask url_for):
  - browse-properties-button: url_for('property_search')
  - my-inquiries-button: url_for('my_inquiries')
  - my-favorites-button: url_for('my_favorites')
- Forms: None

---

### 2. search.html
- Page Title: Property Search
- Element IDs:
  - search-page
  - location-input
  - price-range-min
  - price-range-max
  - property-type-filter
  - properties-grid
  - view-property-button-{{ property.property_id }} (dynamic for each property)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): All property listings to display. Keys include property_id (int), address (str), location (str), price (float), property_type (str), bedrooms (int), bathrooms (float).
  - locations (list of dict): List of locations available (optional for filter suggestions).
  - filter_options (dict): Current filter selections with keys: location_input (str), price_range_min (float), price_range_max (float), property_type_filter (str).
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-property-button-{{ property.property_id }}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property.property_id)
- Forms:
  - Search/Filter form with inputs:
    - location-input
    - price-range-min
    - price-range-max
    - property-type-filter
    - Submit button with ID: "search-submit-button"
    - Form action: url_for('property_search') method: POST

---

### 3. property_details.html
- Page Title: Property Details
- Element IDs:
  - property-details-page
  - property-address
  - property-price
  - property-description
  - property-features
  - add-to-favorites-button
  - submit-inquiry-button
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Detailed property info including keys: property_id (int), address (str), price (float), description (str), bedrooms (int), bathrooms (float), square_feet (int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - add-to-favorites-button: url_for('add_to_favorites', property_id=property.property_id) (POST request)
  - submit-inquiry-button: url_for('property_inquiry') or property inquiry submission
- Forms:
  - Add to favorites form with submit button ID: add-to-favorites-button, action route: url_for('add_to_favorites', property_id=property.property_id), method POST
  - Inquiry submission may be a link/button to inquiry page

---

### 4. inquiry.html
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Element IDs:
  - inquiry-page
  - select-property
  - inquiry-name
  - inquiry-email
  - inquiry-phone
  - inquiry-message
  - submit-inquiry-button
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): List of properties for dropdown selection, keys: property_id (int), address (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - Form action: url_for('submit_inquiry') method: POST
- Forms:
  - Inquiry form with input fields above, submit button ID: submit-inquiry-button

---

### 5. inquiries.html
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Element IDs:
  - inquiries-page
  - inquiries-table
  - inquiry-status-filter
  - delete-inquiry-button-{{ inquiry.inquiry_id }} (dynamic for each inquiry)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): List of inquiries with keys: inquiry_id (int), property_id (int), customer_name (str), customer_email (str), customer_phone (str), message (str), inquiry_date (str), status (str)
  - status_filter (str): Current filter applied
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Filter form with inquiry-status-filter dropdown, submit button ID: inquiry-filter-submit
  - Delete inquiry buttons with IDs as above, each submitting POST to delete route

---

### 6. favorites.html
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Element IDs:
  - favorites-page
  - favorites-list
  - remove-from-favorites-button-{{ property.property_id }} (dynamic for each favorite property)
  - view-property-button-{{ property.property_id }} (dynamic for each favorite property)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - favorites (list of dict): List of favorite records with keys: favorite_id (int), property_id (int), added_date (str)
  - properties_dict (dict): Dictionary mapping property_id (int) to property dict for display details
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-property-button-{{ property.property_id }}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property.property_id)
- Forms:
  - Remove from favorites form/button with submit button ID as above (POST)

---

### 7. agents.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Element IDs:
  - agents-page
  - agents-list
  - agent-search
  - contact-agent-button-{{ agent.agent_id }} (dynamic for each agent)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): List of agents with keys: agent_id (int), agent_name (str), specialization (str), email (str), phone (str), properties_sold (int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Agent search form input (agent-search) may be a client-side filter
  - Contact agent button(s) usage unspecified (possibly mailto links or modal)

---

### 8. locations.html
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Element IDs:
  - locations-page
  - locations-list
  - view-location-button-{{ location.location_id }} (dynamic for each location)
  - location-sort
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): List of locations with keys: location_id (int), location_name (str), region (str), average_price (float), property_count (int), description (str)
  - sort_option (str): Current sort selection
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-location-button-{{ location.location_id }}: Action to view properties in location (implementation detail: possibly a route or filtering in search)
- Forms:
  - Sort form with location-sort dropdown, submit button with ID: location-sort-submit

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. properties.txt
- File Path: data/properties.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  property_id|address|location|price|property_type|bedrooms|bathrooms|square_feet|description|agent_id|status
- Data Description: Stores property listings with details including location, price, features, associated agent, and status.
- Example Rows:
  1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold

---

### 2. locations.txt
- File Path: data/locations.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  location_id|location_name|region|average_price|property_count|description
- Data Description: Stores location data including name, region, average property price, and number of properties.
- Example Rows:
  1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area

---

### 3. inquiries.txt
- File Path: data/inquiries.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  inquiry_id|property_id|customer_name|customer_email|customer_phone|message|inquiry_date|status
- Data Description: Stores customer inquiries related to properties including contact and status info.
- Example Rows:
  1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved

---

### 4. favorites.txt
- File Path: data/favorites.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  favorite_id|property_id|added_date
- Data Description: Stores favorite properties with the date they were added.
- Example Rows:
  1|1|2025-01-10
  2|2|2025-01-12
  3|3|2025-01-14

---

### 5. agents.txt
- File Path: data/agents.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  agent_id|agent_name|specialization|email|phone|properties_sold
- Data Description: Stores real estate agent details including specialization and contact info.
- Example Rows:
  101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67

log.before:
# Design Specification for RealEstate Web Application

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                 | HTTP Method | Function Name           | Template Rendered         | Route Parameters         | Context Variables Passed to Template (name : type) | POST Form Data Expected (name : type)                                  |
|----------------------------|-------------|------------------------|---------------------------|--------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | GET         | root_redirect           | -                         | -                        | -                                                   | -                                                                         |
| /dashboard                 | GET         | dashboard              | dashboard.html            | -                        | featured_properties : list(dict), recent_listings : list(dict)          | -                                                                         |
| /search                   | GET         | property_search        | search.html               | -                        | properties : list(dict), locations : list(dict), filter_options : dict   | -                                                                         |
| /search                   | POST        | property_search        | search.html               | -                        | properties : list(dict), locations : list(dict), filter_options : dict   | location_input : str, price_range_min : float, price_range_max : float, property_type_filter : str |
| /property/<int:property_id> | GET         | property_details       | property_details.html     | property_id : int        | property : dict                                                         | -                                                                         |
| /inquiry                  | GET         | property_inquiry       | inquiry.html              | -                        | properties : list(dict)                                                 | -                                                                         |
| /inquiry                  | POST        | submit_inquiry         | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict)                                                  | select_property : int (property_id), inquiry_name : str, inquiry_email : str, inquiry_phone : str, inquiry_message : str |
| /inquiries                | GET         | my_inquiries           | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                           | -                                                                         |
| /inquiries/filter         | POST        | filter_inquiries       | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                           | inquiry_status_filter : str                                               |
| /inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id> | POST | delete_inquiry         | inquiries.html            | inquiry_id : int         | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                           | -                                                                         |
| /favorites                | GET         | my_favorites           | favorites.html            | -                        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id -> dict)     | -                                                                         |
| /favorites/add/<int:property_id> | POST | add_to_favorites        | favorites.html            | property_id : int        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id -> dict)     | -                                                                         |
| /favorites/remove/<int:property_id> | POST | remove_from_favorites    | favorites.html            | property_id : int        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id -> dict)     | -                                                                         |
| /agents                   | GET         | agent_directory        | agents.html               | -                        | agents : list(dict)                                                    | -                                                                         |
| /locations                | GET         | locations_page         | locations.html            | -                        | locations : list(dict), sort_option : str                             | -                                                                         |
| /locations/sort           | POST        | sort_locations         | locations.html            | -                        | locations : list(dict), sort_option : str                             | location_sort : str                                                       |

### Explanation:
- The root route `/` redirects to `/dashboard`.
- For POST routes handling forms, the expected form fields are defined.
- Context variables include lists of dictionaries representing data records.
- The favorites page requires both favorites list and a property lookup dictionary for display.
- Inquiries filtering and deletion are handled via POST requests to appropriate routes.
- The locations page supports sorting via POST route.

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates (Frontend)

### 1. dashboard.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page
  - featured-properties
  - browse-properties-button
  - my-inquiries-button
  - my-favorites-button
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendations. Each dict includes keys: property_id (int), address (str), price (float), image_url (str).
  - recent_listings (list of dict): Recent property listings, same structure as featured_properties.
- Navigation Mappings (Flask url_for):
  - browse-properties-button: url_for('property_search')
  - my-inquiries-button: url_for('my_inquiries')
  - my-favorites-button: url_for('my_favorites')
- Forms: None

---

### 2. search.html
- Page Title: Property Search
- Element IDs:
  - search-page
  - location-input
  - price-range-min
  - price-range-max
  - property-type-filter
  - properties-grid
  - view-property-button-{{ property.property_id }} (dynamic for each property)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): All property listings to display. Keys include property_id (int), address (str), location (str), price (float), property_type (str), bedrooms (int), bathrooms (float).
  - locations (list of dict): List of locations available (optional for filter suggestions).
  - filter_options (dict): Current filter selections with keys: location_input (str), price_range_min (float), price_range_max (float), property_type_filter (str).
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-property-button-{{ property.property_id }}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property.property_id)
- Forms:
  - Search/Filter form with inputs:
    - location-input
    - price-range-min
    - price-range-max
    - property-type-filter
    - Submit button with ID: "search-submit-button"
    - Form action: url_for('property_search') method: POST

---

### 3. property_details.html
- Page Title: Property Details
- Element IDs:
  - property-details-page
  - property-address
  - property-price
  - property-description
  - property-features
  - add-to-favorites-button
  - submit-inquiry-button
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Detailed property info including keys: property_id (int), address (str), price (float), description (str), bedrooms (int), bathrooms (float), square_feet (int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - add-to-favorites-button: url_for('add_to_favorites', property_id=property.property_id) (POST request)
  - submit-inquiry-button: url_for('property_inquiry') or property inquiry submission
- Forms:
  - Add to favorites form with submit button ID: add-to-favorites-button, action route: url_for('add_to_favorites', property_id=property.property_id), method POST
  - Inquiry submission may be a link/button to inquiry page

---

### 4. inquiry.html
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Element IDs:
  - inquiry-page
  - select-property
  - inquiry-name
  - inquiry-email
  - inquiry-phone
  - inquiry-message
  - submit-inquiry-button
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): List of properties for dropdown selection, keys: property_id (int), address (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - Form action: url_for('submit_inquiry') method: POST
- Forms:
  - Inquiry form with input fields above, submit button ID: submit-inquiry-button

---

### 5. inquiries.html
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Element IDs:
  - inquiries-page
  - inquiries-table
  - inquiry-status-filter
  - delete-inquiry-button-{{ inquiry.inquiry_id }} (dynamic for each inquiry)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): List of inquiries with keys: inquiry_id (int), property_id (int), customer_name (str), customer_email (str), customer_phone (str), message (str), inquiry_date (str), status (str)
  - status_filter (str): Current filter applied
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Filter form with inquiry-status-filter dropdown, submit button ID: inquiry-filter-submit
  - Delete inquiry buttons with IDs as above, each submitting POST to delete route

---

### 6. favorites.html
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Element IDs:
  - favorites-page
  - favorites-list
  - remove-from-favorites-button-{{ property.property_id }} (dynamic for each favorite property)
  - view-property-button-{{ property.property_id }} (dynamic for each favorite property)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - favorites (list of dict): List of favorite records with keys: favorite_id (int), property_id (int), added_date (str)
  - properties_dict (dict): Dictionary mapping property_id (int) to property dict for display details
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-property-button-{{ property.property_id }}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property.property_id)
- Forms:
  - Remove from favorites form/button with submit button ID as above (POST)

---

### 7. agents.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Element IDs:
  - agents-page
  - agents-list
  - agent-search
  - contact-agent-button-{{ agent.agent_id }} (dynamic for each agent)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): List of agents with keys: agent_id (int), agent_name (str), specialization (str), email (str), phone (str), properties_sold (int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Agent search form input (agent-search) may be a client-side filter
  - Contact agent button(s) usage unspecified (possibly mailto links or modal)

---

### 8. locations.html
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Element IDs:
  - locations-page
  - locations-list
  - view-location-button-{{ location.location_id }} (dynamic for each location)
  - location-sort
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): List of locations with keys: location_id (int), location_name (str), region (str), average_price (float), property_count (int), description (str)
  - sort_option (str): Current sort selection
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-location-button-{{ location.location_id }}: Action to view properties in location (implementation detail: possibly a route or filtering in search)
- Forms:
  - Sort form with location-sort dropdown, submit button with ID: location-sort-submit

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. properties.txt
- File Path: data/properties.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  property_id|address|location|price|property_type|bedrooms|bathrooms|square_feet|description|agent_id|status
- Data Description: Stores property listings with details including location, price, features, associated agent, and status.
- Example Rows:
  1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold

---

### 2. locations.txt
- File Path: data/locations.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  location_id|location_name|region|average_price|property_count|description
- Data Description: Stores location data including name, region, average property price, and number of properties.
- Example Rows:
  1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area

---

### 3. inquiries.txt
- File Path: data/inquiries.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  inquiry_id|property_id|customer_name|customer_email|customer_phone|message|inquiry_date|status
- Data Description: Stores customer inquiries related to properties including contact and status info.
- Example Rows:
  1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved

---

### 4. favorites.txt
- File Path: data/favorites.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  favorite_id|property_id|added_date
- Data Description: Stores favorite properties with the date they were added.
- Example Rows:
  1|1|2025-01-10
  2|2|2025-01-12
  3|3|2025-01-14

---

### 5. agents.txt
- File Path: data/agents.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  agent_id|agent_name|specialization|email|phone|properties_sold
- Data Description: Stores real estate agent details including specialization and contact info.
- Example Rows:
  101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67

log.before:
# Design Specification for RealEstate Web Application

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                     | HTTP Method | Function Name              | Template Rendered         | Route Parameters         | Context Variables Passed to Template (name : type)                                         | POST Form Data Expected (name : type)                                         |
|-------------------------------|-------------|----------------------------|---------------------------|--------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                             | GET         | root_redirect               | -                         | -                        | -                                                                                               | -                                                                             |
| /dashboard                    | GET         | dashboard                  | dashboard.html            | -                        | featured_properties : list(dict), recent_listings : list(dict)                             | -                                                                             |
| /search                      | GET         | property_search            | search.html               | -                        | properties : list(dict), locations : list(dict), filter_options : dict                    | -                                                                             |
| /search                      | POST        | property_search            | search.html               | -                        | properties : list(dict), locations : list(dict), filter_options : dict                    | location_input : str, price_range_min : float, price_range_max : float, property_type_filter : str |
| /property/<int:property_id>   | GET         | property_details           | property_details.html     | property_id : int        | property : dict                                                                           | -                                                                             |
| /inquiry                     | GET         | property_inquiry           | inquiry.html              | -                        | properties : list(dict)                                                                  | -                                                                             |
| /inquiry                     | POST        | submit_inquiry             | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict)                                                                   | select_property : int, inquiry_name : str, inquiry_email : str, inquiry_phone : str, inquiry_message : str |
| /inquiries                   | GET         | my_inquiries               | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                                          | -                                                                             |
| /inquiries/filter            | POST        | filter_inquiries           | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                                          | inquiry_status_filter : str                                                   |
| /inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id> | POST  | delete_inquiry             | inquiries.html            | inquiry_id : int         | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                                          | -                                                                             |
| /favorites                   | GET         | my_favorites               | favorites.html            | -                        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id to dict)                   | -                                                                             |
| /favorites/add/<int:property_id> | POST   | add_to_favorites           | favorites.html            | property_id : int        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id to dict)                   | -                                                                             |
| /favorites/remove/<int:property_id> | POST | remove_from_favorites      | favorites.html            | property_id : int        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id to dict)                   | -                                                                             |
| /agents                      | GET         | agent_directory            | agents.html               | -                        | agents : list(dict)                                                                    | -                                                                             |
| /locations                   | GET         | locations_page             | locations.html            | -                        | locations : list(dict), sort_option : str                                           | -                                                                             |
| /locations/sort              | POST        | sort_locations             | locations.html            | -                        | locations : list(dict), sort_option : str                                           | location_sort : str                                                           |

### Notes on Context Variables:
- `featured_properties`, `recent_listings`, `properties`, `inquiries`, `favorites`, and `agents` are lists of dictionaries, each dictionary representing one data record from respective data files, parsed into fields.
- `properties_dict` is a dictionary keyed by property_id with value as full property dict for display in favorites.
- `filter_options`, `status_filter`, and `sort_option` are strings or dicts representing current filter/sort states.

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates (Frontend)

### 1. dashboard.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page
  - featured-properties
  - browse-properties-button
  - my-inquiries-button
  - my-favorites-button
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendations; each dict with property_id (int), address (str), price (float), image_url (str).
  - recent_listings (list of dict): Recent property listings; same structure as featured_properties.
- Navigation Mappings:
  - browse-properties-button: url_for('property_search')
  - my-inquiries-button: url_for('my_inquiries')
  - my-favorites-button: url_for('my_favorites')
- Forms: None

---

### 2. search.html
- Page Title: Property Search
- Element IDs:
  - search-page
  - location-input
  - price-range-min
  - price-range-max
  - property-type-filter
  - properties-grid
  - view-property-button-{{property_id}} (dynamic for each property)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): List of all properties with keys: property_id (int), address (str), location (str), price (float), property_type (str), bedrooms (int), bathrooms (float).
  - locations (list of dict): Optional; list of locations for filter suggestions.
  - filter_options (dict): Current filter selections with keys: location_input (str), price_range_min (float), price_range_max (float), property_type_filter (str).
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-property-button-{{property_id}}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - Search/filter form
    - Inputs with IDs: location-input, price-range-min, price-range-max, property-type-filter
    - Submit button with ID: search-submit-button
    - Form action: url_for('property_search'), method POST

---

### 3. property_details.html
- Page Title: Property Details
- Element IDs:
  - property-details-page
  - property-address
  - property-price
  - property-description
  - property-features
  - add-to-favorites-button
  - submit-inquiry-button
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Property details with keys: property_id (int), address (str), price (float), description (str), bedrooms (int), bathrooms (float), square_feet (int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - add-to-favorites-button: url_for('add_to_favorites', property_id=property.property_id) (POST)
  - submit-inquiry-button: url_for('property_inquiry')
- Forms:
  - Add to favorites form with button ID add-to-favorites-button, action POST to add_to_favorites route with property_id
  - Inquiry submission button linking to inquiry page

---

### 4. inquiry.html
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Element IDs:
  - inquiry-page
  - select-property
  - inquiry-name
  - inquiry-email
  - inquiry-phone
  - inquiry-message
  - submit-inquiry-button
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): List of properties with keys property_id (int), address (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - Form action: url_for('submit_inquiry'), method POST
- Forms:
  - Inquiry form with inputs IDs as above
  - Submit button ID: submit-inquiry-button

---

### 5. inquiries.html
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Element IDs:
  - inquiries-page
  - inquiries-table
  - inquiry-status-filter
  - delete-inquiry-button-{{inquiry_id}} (dynamic for each inquiry)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): Each dict includes inquiry_id (int), property_id (int), customer_name (str), customer_email (str), customer_phone (str), message (str), inquiry_date (str), status (str)
  - status_filter (str): Current inquiry status filter
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Filter form with dropdown inquiry-status-filter and submit button inquiry-filter-submit
  - Delete inquiry buttons with IDs per inquiry

---

### 6. favorites.html
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Element IDs:
  - favorites-page
  - favorites-list
  - remove-from-favorites-button-{{property_id}} (dynamic for each favorite property)
  - view-property-button-{{property_id}} (dynamic for each favorite property)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - favorites (list of dict): Each dict with favorite_id (int), property_id (int), added_date (str)
  - properties_dict (dict): Map property_id (int) to property dict
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-property-button-{{property_id}}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - Remove from favorites form/button with ID remove-from-favorites-button-{{property_id}}, method POST

---

### 7. agents.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Element IDs:
  - agents-page
  - agents-list
  - agent-search
  - contact-agent-button-{{agent_id}} (dynamic for each agent)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): Each dict with agent_id (int), agent_name (str), specialization (str), email (str), phone (str), properties_sold (int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Agent search input with ID agent-search (client-side filtering possibly)

---

### 8. locations.html
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Element IDs:
  - locations-page
  - locations-list
  - view-location-button-{{location_id}} (dynamic for each location)
  - location-sort
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): Each dict with location_id (int), location_name (str), region (str), average_price (float), property_count (int), description (str)
  - sort_option (str): Current sorting selection
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-location-button-{{location_id}}: Action to view properties in given location (implementation dependent)
- Forms:
  - Sort form with location-sort dropdown and submit button location-sort-submit

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. properties.txt
- File Path: data/properties.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited): property_id|address|location|price|property_type|bedrooms|bathrooms|square_feet|description|agent_id|status
- Data Description: Contains property listings with details including address, location, price, property type, features, agent reference, and listing status.
- Example Rows:
  1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold

---

### 2. locations.txt
- File Path: data/locations.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited): location_id|location_name|region|average_price|property_count|description
- Data Description: Stores popular location data with name, region, average property price, property count, and descriptive info.
- Example Rows:
  1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area

---

### 3. inquiries.txt
- File Path: data/inquiries.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited): inquiry_id|property_id|customer_name|customer_email|customer_phone|message|inquiry_date|status
- Data Description: Contains customer inquiries about properties including contact details, inquiry message, date, and status.
- Example Rows:
  1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved

---

### 4. favorites.txt
- File Path: data/favorites.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited): favorite_id|property_id|added_date
- Data Description: Lists favorite properties with property references and the date added.
- Example Rows:
  1|1|2025-01-10
  2|2|2025-01-12
  3|3|2025-01-14

---

### 5. agents.txt
- File Path: data/agents.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited): agent_id|agent_name|specialization|email|phone|properties_sold
- Data Description: Stores real estate agents with contact and sales information.
- Example Rows:
  101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67

# Design Specification for RealEstate Web Application

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                     | HTTP Method | Function Name              | Template Rendered         | Route Parameters         | Context Variables Passed to Template (name : type)                                         | POST Form Data Expected (name : type)                                         |
|-------------------------------|-------------|----------------------------|---------------------------|--------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                             | GET         | root_redirect               | -                         | -                        | -                                                                                               | -                                                                             |
| /dashboard                    | GET         | dashboard                  | dashboard.html            | -                        | featured_properties : list(dict), recent_listings : list(dict)                             | -                                                                             |
| /search                      | GET         | property_search            | search.html               | -                        | properties : list(dict), locations : list(dict), filter_options : dict                    | -                                                                             |
| /search                      | POST        | property_search            | search.html               | -                        | properties : list(dict), locations : list(dict), filter_options : dict                    | location_input : str, price_range_min : float, price_range_max : float, property_type_filter : str |
| /property/<int:property_id>   | GET         | property_details           | property_details.html     | property_id : int        | property : dict                                                                           | -                                                                             |
| /inquiry                     | GET         | property_inquiry           | inquiry.html              | -                        | properties : list(dict)                                                                  | -                                                                             |
| /inquiry                     | POST        | submit_inquiry             | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict)                                                                   | select_property : int, inquiry_name : str, inquiry_email : str, inquiry_phone : str, inquiry_message : str |
| /inquiries                   | GET         | my_inquiries               | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                                          | -                                                                             |
| /inquiries/filter            | POST        | filter_inquiries           | inquiries.html            | -                        | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                                          | inquiry_status_filter : str                                                   |
| /inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id> | POST  | delete_inquiry             | inquiries.html            | inquiry_id : int         | inquiries : list(dict), status_filter : str                                          | -                                                                             |
| /favorites                   | GET         | my_favorites               | favorites.html            | -                        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id to dict)                   | -                                                                             |
| /favorites/add/<int:property_id> | POST   | add_to_favorites           | favorites.html            | property_id : int        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id to dict)                   | -                                                                             |
| /favorites/remove/<int:property_id> | POST | remove_from_favorites      | favorites.html            | property_id : int        | favorites : list(dict), properties_dict : dict (property_id to dict)                   | -                                                                             |
| /agents                      | GET         | agent_directory            | agents.html               | -                        | agents : list(dict)                                                                    | -                                                                             |
| /locations                   | GET         | locations_page             | locations.html            | -                        | locations : list(dict), sort_option : str                                           | -                                                                             |
| /locations/sort              | POST        | sort_locations             | locations.html            | -                        | locations : list(dict), sort_option : str                                           | location_sort : str                                                           |

### Notes on Context Variables:
- `featured_properties`, `recent_listings`, `properties`, `inquiries`, `favorites`, and `agents` are lists of dictionaries, each dictionary representing one data record from respective data files, parsed into fields.
- `properties_dict` is a dictionary keyed by property_id with value as full property dict for display in favorites.
- `filter_options`, `status_filter`, and `sort_option` are strings or dicts representing current filter/sort states.

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates (Frontend)

### 1. dashboard.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page
  - featured-properties
  - browse-properties-button
  - my-inquiries-button
  - my-favorites-button
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendations; each dict with property_id (int), address (str), price (float), image_url (str).
  - recent_listings (list of dict): Recent property listings; same structure as featured_properties.
- Navigation Mappings:
  - browse-properties-button: url_for('property_search')
  - my-inquiries-button: url_for('my_inquiries')
  - my-favorites-button: url_for('my_favorites')
- Forms: None

---

### 2. search.html
- Page Title: Property Search
- Element IDs:
  - search-page
  - location-input
  - price-range-min
  - price-range-max
  - property-type-filter
  - properties-grid
  - view-property-button-{{property_id}} (dynamic for each property)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): List of all properties with keys: property_id (int), address (str), location (str), price (float), property_type (str), bedrooms (int), bathrooms (float).
  - locations (list of dict): Optional; list of locations for filter suggestions.
  - filter_options (dict): Current filter selections with keys: location_input (str), price_range_min (float), price_range_max (float), property_type_filter (str).
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-property-button-{{property_id}}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - Search/filter form
    - Inputs with IDs: location-input, price-range-min, price-range-max, property-type-filter
    - Submit button with ID: search-submit-button
    - Form action: url_for('property_search'), method POST

---

### 3. property_details.html
- Page Title: Property Details
- Element IDs:
  - property-details-page
  - property-address
  - property-price
  - property-description
  - property-features
  - add-to-favorites-button
  - submit-inquiry-button
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Property details with keys: property_id (int), address (str), price (float), description (str), bedrooms (int), bathrooms (float), square_feet (int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - add-to-favorites-button: url_for('add_to_favorites', property_id=property.property_id) (POST)
  - submit-inquiry-button: url_for('property_inquiry')
- Forms:
  - Add to favorites form with button ID add-to-favorites-button, action POST to add_to_favorites route with property_id
  - Inquiry submission button linking to inquiry page

---

### 4. inquiry.html
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Element IDs:
  - inquiry-page
  - select-property
  - inquiry-name
  - inquiry-email
  - inquiry-phone
  - inquiry-message
  - submit-inquiry-button
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): List of properties with keys property_id (int), address (str)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - Form action: url_for('submit_inquiry'), method POST
- Forms:
  - Inquiry form with inputs IDs as above
  - Submit button ID: submit-inquiry-button

---

### 5. inquiries.html
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Element IDs:
  - inquiries-page
  - inquiries-table
  - inquiry-status-filter
  - delete-inquiry-button-{{inquiry_id}} (dynamic for each inquiry)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): Each dict includes inquiry_id (int), property_id (int), customer_name (str), customer_email (str), customer_phone (str), message (str), inquiry_date (str), status (str)
  - status_filter (str): Current inquiry status filter
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Filter form with dropdown inquiry-status-filter and submit button inquiry-filter-submit
  - Delete inquiry buttons with IDs per inquiry

---

### 6. favorites.html
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Element IDs:
  - favorites-page
  - favorites-list
  - remove-from-favorites-button-{{property_id}} (dynamic for each favorite property)
  - view-property-button-{{property_id}} (dynamic for each favorite property)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - favorites (list of dict): Each dict with favorite_id (int), property_id (int), added_date (str)
  - properties_dict (dict): Map property_id (int) to property dict
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-property-button-{{property_id}}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - Remove from favorites form/button with ID remove-from-favorites-button-{{property_id}}, method POST

---

### 7. agents.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Element IDs:
  - agents-page
  - agents-list
  - agent-search
  - contact-agent-button-{{agent_id}} (dynamic for each agent)
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): Each dict with agent_id (int), agent_name (str), specialization (str), email (str), phone (str), properties_sold (int)
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Agent search input with ID agent-search (client-side filtering possibly)

---

### 8. locations.html
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Element IDs:
  - locations-page
  - locations-list
  - view-location-button-{{location_id}} (dynamic for each location)
  - location-sort
  - back-to-dashboard
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): Each dict with location_id (int), location_name (str), region (str), average_price (float), property_count (int), description (str)
  - sort_option (str): Current sorting selection
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-location-button-{{location_id}}: Action to view properties in given location (implementation dependent)
- Forms:
  - Sort form with location-sort dropdown and submit button location-sort-submit

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. properties.txt
- File Path: data/properties.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited): property_id|address|location|price|property_type|bedrooms|bathrooms|square_feet|description|agent_id|status
- Data Description: Contains property listings with details including address, location, price, property type, features, agent reference, and listing status.
- Example Rows:
  1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold

---

### 2. locations.txt
- File Path: data/locations.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited): location_id|location_name|region|average_price|property_count|description
- Data Description: Stores popular location data with name, region, average property price, property count, and descriptive info.
- Example Rows:
  1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area

---

### 3. inquiries.txt
- File Path: data/inquiries.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited): inquiry_id|property_id|customer_name|customer_email|customer_phone|message|inquiry_date|status
- Data Description: Contains customer inquiries about properties including contact details, inquiry message, date, and status.
- Example Rows:
  1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved

---

### 4. favorites.txt
- File Path: data/favorites.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited): favorite_id|property_id|added_date
- Data Description: Lists favorite properties with property references and the date added.
- Example Rows:
  1|1|2025-01-10
  2|2|2025-01-12
  3|3|2025-01-14

---

### 5. agents.txt
- File Path: data/agents.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited): agent_id|agent_name|specialization|email|phone|properties_sold
- Data Description: Stores real estate agents with contact and sales information.
- Example Rows:
  101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67
